text: K…Ыkpas…Ы k…Ыl…Ы m…Ы …Фs…Ы Owusoso Akaa efeke y…Ы eden…Ф bekpu…Ф m…Ы as…Ы t…Ы at…Ыba ts…Фm…ФћГ, baf…Фn…Ф…Ы …Ыl…Ы elu n…Ы ebui al…Ы m…Ы as…Ы, вАЬ вАШ∆Рba k…Фw…Ф an…Ф dadal…Ы n…ЫћА tiyuyulaћА g…Ы bat…Ф…Ц…Ф elu ak…Ф David p…Ы k…Ыt…ЫbaћА tsyina.вАЩ
translated: K…Ыkpas…Ы K…Ыl…Ы went to Owusoso Akaa and spoke to the people of Edeno Bekpuo, saying, вАЬIf you had known the things that make for peace at this time, you would have been saved, but now they are hidden from you,вАЭ as it is written in the prophecy of Elijah about David.

ref: First, I thank God in the name of Jesus Christ for all of you. I do this because people everywhere in the world are talking about your faith.
text: Iput…Ф, ihu m…Ы Owusoso Akaa ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы w…Фn…Ф …Ыtakpu …Фgana Yesu Kristo abha, …Фm…Фs…Ы ba…Ц…Ф w…Фn…Ф t…Ыy…Ыy…Ыk…Ы≈ЛaћГ ibui afala n…Ф n…Ы kan…Ф n…ФћА m…Ы ny…ФћГ…Ф.
translated: Therefore, we, the Church of the Living God, who are the body of Jesus Christ, are called to be holy and blameless before Him in love.

ref: Look after yourselves and everyone the Holy Spirit has placed in your care. Be like shepherds to God's church. It is the flock he bought with the blood of his own Son.
text: N…ФzanaћА aw…ФћГ …Фk…Ф w…Фn…Ф ishu t…Ы nozo…Цi ibhoshi…Ы g…Ы ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa GbangbaћГ …Фkp…Ы w…Фn…Ф ah…Ф…Ы …Фs…Ы n…Фo…Цi …Ыl…Ы abha. Nodzi ibhoshi agbagbana elete …Фk…Ф Owusoso Akaa …Фhaa, g…Ы edzi n…Ы y…Ы dzyosu n…Ф.
translated: The chief of the land and the people of Nozodi went to the house of Offufuia Gbangba to inform them about the war. The elders of the town and Owusoso Akaa came, and they said that they would not accept the peace.

ref: Now send some men to Joppa for a man named Simon Peter.
text: Kp…ЫћА ban…Ф …Фs…Ыs…Ы Yopa t…ЫћА bekulu any…Ы teli g…Ы bekulu y…Ыas…Ы Simon, p…Ы bekeћАkulu tsy…Ы as…Ы Petro …Фmana.
translated: Barnabas in Joppa went to the house of Simon and met him, and the disciples addressed Peter as Lord.

ref: Others made fun of the Lord's followers and said, вАЬThey are drunk.вАЭ Peter Speaks to the Crowd
text: Beteli x…Фn…Ф aa…Ц…Ф am…Ф…Ыbui n…Ы bal…Ыishu k…Ыl…Ы ba…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАЬBunu baw…ФћГ…Ы ebuku. Petro A…Ц…Ф Ka…Ц…Ф Ak…Ф Ban…Ф…Ыza
translated: Go quickly and tell his disciples, "He has risen from the dead. Peter and the others will see him in Galilee."

ref: As soon as Paul came in, the leaders from Jerusalem crowded around him and said he was guilty of many serious crimes. But they could not prove anything.
text: Kibe…Ы g…Ы Paulo ebeku…Ф, Yudan…Ы g…Ыede Yerusalem abaa ebeshogoћА n…Ыishu, p…Ы bal…Фk…Ф ebui gagaliћГ n…Ыishu, ebui…Ы g…Ы bat…Ы alaћА al…Ы m…Ы ebuћБ tsy…Ы.
translated: Kibe…Ы sent Paul to Jerusalem, and Judah went to Antioch, and there was a dispute among the brothers, and they spoke to them, but they departed.

ref: Philip ran up close and heard the man reading aloud from the book of Isaiah. Philip asked him, вАЬDo you understand what you are reading?вАЭ
text: K…Ыl…Ы Filipo ebu ts…Ыts…Ы…Ц…Ы m…Ы av…Ы apaka ohu…Ф shu, k…Ыl…Ы eluћГ g…Ы any…Ы…Ы aakalaћА ebui…Ц…Фluan…Ф Yesaya keplukpa. Filipo ebisi any…Ы as…Ы, вАЬOluћГ k…Ыg…Ы …Ф…ФkalaћА niesi…Ы dza?вАЭ
translated: Then Philip ran up and heard him reading the prophet Isaiah, and asked, вАЬDo you understand what you are reading?вАЭ
